name: host
description: Host orchestration agent for Intera Inventory that delegates domain work to specialist product, inventory, POS, and user/workspace agents and formats safe frontend responses.

skills.name: Agent Orchestration
skills.description: Route tenant-scoped requests to specialist product, inventory, POS, and user/workspace agents, then shape the returned data into frontend-friendly interaction flows.
examples: Delegate a product search request to the product agent.
Delegate an inventory alert or stock lookup request to the inventory agent.
Delegate a live cashier or session question to the POS agent.
Delegate a workspace invitation or staff lookup request to the users agent.
Turn delegated results into a searchable selection flow.
